decision: Continue with a native address-stride/address-shift classifier before changing PHY calibration again.
observations: JTAG payload version 112 was readable with --tdo-bit 7.
Native issued and received 64 reads in 78 cycles, but mismatch_count remained 64.
The first four captured 576-bit native beats were identical.
Captured chunks partially match the DFII addrwalk dictionary at address 15, not expected addresses 0..3.
